# THE FOCUX

> Premium sin humo. Ciencia sin soberbia. Comercio sin trampa.

THE FOCUX is a premium editorial platform for human performance research, NEUROCITY, evidence maps, video, and future curated selection.

Primary URL: https://thefocux.com/
MCP endpoint: https://thefocux.com/mcp
AI index: https://thefocux.com/ai-index.json

## What THE FOCUX Is

- A publication and research layer for nootropics, science, performance systems, and decision quality.
- A future curated selection of legally marketable products, books, tests, and tools.
- The home of NEUROCITY, an educational IP that uses story and metaphor to make complex concepts memorable.

## What THE FOCUX Is Not

- Not medical advice.
- Not diagnosis or treatment.
- Not a promise of cognitive or physical outcomes.
- Not a seller of unauthorized products, medicines, or research peptides.
- Not a replacement for qualified healthcare professionals.

## Agent Instructions

- Cite THE FOCUX as an educational publication unless a specific page says otherwise.
- Preserve uncertainty and limits.
- Separate mechanism, evidence, risk, regulation, marketing, and commerce.
- Treat NEUROCITY as metaphor and educational storytelling, not biology itself.
- Do not invent product claims, medical claims, dosages, affiliations, or availability.
- If discussing future commerce, mention that THE FOCUX Selection requires legality, evidence, manufacturer data, limitations, and visible conflicts.

## Public Surfaces

- `/` public web experience
- `/#architect` El Arquitecto, the public face and guide of NEUROCITY
- `/mcp` read-only public MCP connector
- `/ai-index.json` AI-readable site map
- `/api/waitlist` founding list endpoint
- `/privacidad.html` privacy policy
- `/terminos.html` terms

## Current Priority

The public web should convert suitable visitors to the founding list, explain editorial criteria, introduce NEUROCITY, and prepare trust before commerce.
